hero.description: Custom web development and design solutions that help your brand stand out in the digital world.

about.title: About Bravix Creative
about.subtitle: Founded by Nihat Önal
about.paragraph1: At Bravix Creative, we specialize in transforming ideas into digital experiences. As a modern design and development studio, we deliver tailored solutions that combine clean code, strong visuals, and user-centered functionality.
about.paragraph2: With a focus on performance, usability, and brand identity, we help businesses and entrepreneurs create impactful websites and digital products that stand out in today’s competitive landscape. Whether you're launching a new brand or evolving an existing one, we bring clarity, creativity, and consistency to every project.
about.paragraph3: Driven by innovation and guided by strategic thinking, Bravix Creative is your partner in building lasting digital presence.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: How We Help You Succeed
services.webDevDesc: Fast, scalable, and responsive websites developed with React JS and the latest web technologies — built to perform and grow with your business.
services.ecommerceDesc: Robust e-commerce platforms with seamless checkout experiences, secure payment integration, and smart inventory control tailored to your business needs.
services.uiDesignDesc: Intuitive, engaging interfaces designed with a user-first approach — from wireframes to high-fidelity prototypes, crafted in Figma.
services.seoDesc: On-page and technical SEO strategies to boost your visibility, increase organic traffic, and outperform your competition on search engines.
services.mobileAppDesc: Cross-platform mobile apps that work on all devices
services.maintenanceDesc: Continuous website maintenance, performance monitoring, and proactive updates — so your site stays fast, secure, and up-to-date.

webDev.title: Web Development
webDev.description: At Bravix Creative, we deliver custom, responsive websites leveraging React JS, HTML5, and Tailwind CSS. Every project is meticulously crafted to align with your unique business objectives and deliver measurable results.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce Solutions
ecommerce.description: We provide comprehensive e-commerce platforms featuring secure payment processing, streamlined inventory management, and intuitive user interfaces designed to showcase your products effectively and boost online sales.

uiDesign.title: UI/UX Design
uiDesign.description: Our team specializes in creating beautiful, user-centric interfaces that combine aesthetic appeal with seamless usability. From user research to prototyping and final handoff, we ensure every design decision enhances the overall user experience.

seo.title: SEO Optimization
seo.description: We implement tailored SEO strategies that improve your website’s visibility on search engines, increase organic traffic, and drive sustainable business growth through comprehensive site audits, keyword research, and continuous performance monitoring.

mobileApp.title: Mobile Applications
mobileApp.description: Bravix Creative develops cross-platform mobile applications that deliver seamless, engaging experiences across all devices. We manage the entire process from requirements definition through design, development, testing, and app store submission.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.description: Our ongoing maintenance services ensure your website remains secure, up-to-date, and performs optimally. We provide regular updates, security monitoring, performance tuning, content refreshes, and proactive technical support.

portfolio.title: Our Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Explore our recent projects to discover how we deliver innovative solutions that drive success for our clients.

blogPreview.description: Explore the latest insights on digital growth, web design, SEO, and brand strategy.

meta.title: Privacy Policy | Bravix Creative
meta.description: At Bravix Creative, we prioritize the privacy of your personal data. You can find detailed information in our privacy policy.

0.heading: 1. Introduction
0.text: At Bravix Creative, the security of your personal data is our top priority. This policy explains what information we collect when you use our website and how we use that information.

1.heading: 2. Information We Collect
1.text: When you visit our site, certain technical data such as your IP address, browser information, and page interactions may be collected automatically. When you fill out contact forms, we may collect personal data such as your name and email address.

2.heading: 3. Use of Data
2.text: The collected data is used solely to improve our service quality, contact you, and perform statistical analysis. Your data is never shared or sold to third parties.

3.heading: 4. Data Retention
3.text: Your data is retained only for as long as necessary. Unnecessary data is periodically deleted.

4.heading: 5. Your Rights
4.text: Under applicable data protection laws, you have the right to access, correct, delete, or restrict the processing of your data. You can contact us to exercise these rights.

5.heading: 6. Contact
5.text: For questions about our privacy policy, you can contact us at info@bravixcreative.com.

meta.title: Terms of Service | Bravix Creative
meta.description: Please read our Terms of Service carefully before using Bravix Creative services.

0.heading: 1. Acceptance
0.text: By using the Bravix Creative website, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our website.

1.heading: 2. Service Description
1.text: Bravix Creative offers web design and digital solutions. The services offered may be updated or changed over time.

2.heading: 3. User Responsibility
2.text: You are responsible for using our website lawfully, accurately, and safely. Misuse of our services may result in access being restricted.

3.heading: 4. Intellectual Property
3.text: All content on this site (designs, texts, logos, etc.) belongs to Bravix Creative and cannot be used without permission.

4.heading: 5. Changes
4.text: These terms may be updated without prior notice. The updated terms take effect as soon as they are published on the website.

5.heading: 6. Contact
5.text: For questions about these terms, please contact us at info@bravixcreative.com.

meta.title: Cookie Policy | Bravix Creative
meta.description: Learn more about how Bravix Creative uses cookies to improve your experience.

0.heading: 1. What Are Cookies?
0.text: Cookies are small data files stored on your browser by websites to enhance your experience.

1.heading: 2. What Types of Cookies Do We Use?
1.text: We use essential, performance, and analytics cookies to help our site function and improve.

2.heading: 3. How Can You Control Cookies?
2.text: You can accept or reject cookies via your browser settings. However, some features may not function properly.

3.heading: 4. Third-Party Cookies
3.text: We may use third-party services like Google Analytics to collect usage data via cookies.

4.heading: 5. Changes
4.text: We may update this cookie policy from time to time. The revised policy becomes effective upon publication on our site.

5.heading: 6. Contact
5.text: For questions about this policy, contact us at info@bravixcreative.com.
